translation_edit.active_banner: Translation mode active — click the pencil next to any text to edit it.

hero.title: Stay on time. Every time.
hero.subtitle: Card-based scripts for presentations, speeches and panel discussions. Write, rehearse, perform — without losing your thread or your timing.
hero.bullet_quick: Up and running in under a minute

intro.title: What are manuscript cards — and why do they work?
intro.p1: Manuscript cards are short, structured cards that help you keep a clear thread when speaking to an audience. Instead of reading from a long continuous script, you get scannable sections with key points, timings and reminders — exactly what you need to sound natural and confident.
intro.p2: Great presentation craft is as much about preparation as performance. With a script broken into cards you can rehearse more effectively, adjust the length on the fly and handle unexpected questions without losing the thread.
intro.p3: The tool supports you all the way — from the first draft to the lectern itself. Write directly in your browser or import an existing script, then present with the built-in teleprompter on any screen.

value.eyebrow: What you get out of it
value.card_time_text: Write once, rehearse smart. A time budget per card calculates the total for you — no more guessing whether you’re on track.
value.card_clear_text: Short sections, cue colors for pauses, pace and emphasis. You deliver a message that lands — not a recited script.
value.card_safe_text: Large readable text, dark theme and a screen that stays awake. You always know where you are — even if a question takes a detour.

how.title: From draft to stage — in three steps.
how.step1_text: Start from a blank script or drop in a .docx. Speakers and paragraphs are recognized automatically.
how.step2_text: Break the text into manageable sections. Set timings and cue colors wherever you need extra focus.
how.step3_text: Open presentation mode on any screen. The time helper and teleprompter take care of the rest.

audience.title: Built for people who often take the stage.
audience.lead: Consultants, salespeople, executives, moderators, politicians and lecturers — anyone who needs reliable presentation support without getting stuck in PowerPoint.
audience.moderator_text: Lead panel discussions with several voices. Tag contributions per participant and track total time in real time.
audience.speaker_text: A talk at a congress, kickoff or customer event. Hit exactly the right minute, every time.
audience.lecturer_text: Longer sessions with key points, notes and timings per section — for trainers and course leaders.

friction.lead: You don’t need any settings, plug-ins or credit card. Create an account, paste in your script and go.
friction.card1_text: Use the core features with no time limit.
friction.card2_text: Sign up with your email — no payment required.
friction.card3_text: Import or start writing right away.

social.title: Speakers who trust their preparation.
social.quote1_text: The first time I didn’t have to stress about time during a panel. The cards let me be present instead.
social.quote2_text: I now use Manuskort before every major talk. It’s like having a calm I can lean on.

faq.q1_a: Manuscript cards are short, structured sections of your script — with key points, timings and cues. They make it easier to keep a clear thread when speaking to an audience, compared to reading a long continuous manuscript.
faq.q2_q: How do manuscript cards help during a presentation?
faq.q2_a: You get an overview, control over time and clear support during the presentation — without locking yourself into word-for-word text. Cue colors and time budgets help you find the right pace, hold pauses and adjust the length if something unexpected happens.
faq.q3_a: Yes. You can get started entirely for free, no credit card. The free plan is enough for most individual presentations. For unlimited scripts and cards, plus .docx import, there’s a PRO plan.
faq.q4_q: Does it work at the lectern and on stage?
faq.q4_a: Yes. Presentation mode is built for real stages: large readable text, dark theme, fullscreen and a wake-lock that keeps the screen on. It works in the browser on laptop, tablet and phone.
faq.q5_q: Can I import an existing script?
faq.q5_a: Yes. With the PRO plan you can import a .docx script. The tool recognizes speakers and breaks the text into pieces automatically — you just fine-tune.

final.lead: Create your first script in under a minute. Free to try, no credit card.

pricing.title: Choose a plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.free_lead: To get started and try the tool.
pricing.pro_lead: For people who use the tool for real.
pricing.pro_pizza: Less than the price of a pizza per month
pricing.faq_lead: Can’t find the answer? Get in touch and we’ll help.

faqs.q1_q: Can I try it free before upgrading?
faqs.q1_a: Yes. The free plan is free forever and requires no payment card. You can create up to 2 scripts with a max of 15 cards and 5 panel participants per script, and try presentation mode in full.
faqs.q2_q: What happens to my scripts if I cancel PRO?
faqs.q2_a: Nothing disappears. Your scripts, cards and panel participants stay. You return to the free plan’s limits, but all existing content is kept and can be read and presented.
faqs.q3_q: Can I switch between monthly and yearly billing?
faqs.q3_a: Yes. You can switch plan at any time from settings. Switching to yearly billing saves you about 25 % compared to the monthly price.
faqs.q4_a: You upload a Word document and Manuskort automatically splits the text into cards, identifies speakers and suggests timings. You can preview and adjust before saving the import.
faqs.q5_a: Yes, all prices are shown including Swedish VAT (25 %). Companies can enter their organization number at checkout for proper invoicing.
faqs.q6_a: We use Stripe for secure payments. You can pay with Visa, Mastercard, American Express, plus Apple Pay and Google Pay where supported.
faqs.q7_q: Can I cancel the subscription at any time?
faqs.q7_a: Yes. You can cancel easily from settings. PRO stays active until the end of the current billing period, after which the account automatically returns to the free plan.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profile_lead_pre: Used to autofill placeholders in scripts, e.g.
settings.profile_lead_post: . Leave blank if you want the placeholder to remain.
settings.profile_note: Existing scripts are not updated automatically — use Find & replace in the editor.
settings.speech_time_lead: Used to estimate how long each card takes to read aloud. Default is 140 words/min — a normal speaking pace.
settings.wpm_hint: Slow speaker: ~120. Fast speaker: ~160. Tip — try reading a card aloud to check if the estimate matches; adjust as needed.
settings.tours_lead: Reset tours if you want to see them again.
settings.tour_library_replay_toast: The tour will run next time you visit the library
settings.tour_manus_steps: 4 short steps, runs next time you open the example script
settings.tour_manus_replay_toast: The tour will run next time you open the example script
settings.delete_lead: Deleting removes all your scripts, cards, panel participants and your profile forever. This cannot be undone.

settings.delete_normal_warning: All your data will be permanently deleted.
